requirements.task_name: Shortlist a female fashion model in New York under $150/hour with 4.5+ rating for a specific date
requirements.task_description: Search with specific filters and sort order, then shortlist the top result for a specific date.

required_variables.set_condition: After computing and slicing the filtered results, when the search is called with all of the following: location equal to 'New York, NY' (case-insensitive match on location_display), primary_category equal to 'Fashion Model' (case-insensitive), gender equal to 'female', max_hourly_rate defined and <= 150, min_rating defined and >= 4.5, and sort_by equal to 'rating_desc' (corresponding to 'Rating: High to Low').
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the effective search filters, for example: { location, primary_category, gender, max_hourly_rate, min_rating, sort_by }.
required_variables.reason: Records that the user executed a talent search with the exact filter and sort criteria specified in task 1, allowing the evaluator to verify correct use of location, category, gender, rate cap, rating threshold, and rating-desc sort, not just that a suitable model was ultimately shortlisted.

requirements.task_name: Post a casting call for 3 male fitness models in Los Angeles at $100/hour
requirements.task_description: Create and publish a casting call with specific role, gender, location, rate, and dates.

requirements.task_name: Register as a new model and set availability for specific dates
requirements.task_description: Sign up as a model named Alex Jordan in Chicago, set profile fields, languages, and mark availability on specific dates.

requirements.task_name: Book the more socially influential model under a 4-hour budget of $600
requirements.task_description: From the shortlist, compare two models with hourly rates $150 or less, pick the one with higher social reach, and submit a 4-hour booking on a specific date within budget.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getTalentProfileDetails successfully returns a non-null talent and that talent: (a) has an hourly_rate that is a number <= 150, and (b) appears in at least one list whose list_type is 'shortlist' in the combination of talent_lists and talent_list_items (i.e., there is a talent_list_items record linking this talent_id to a list with list_type === 'shortlist').
required_variables.value_to_set: An object of the form { ids: [...] } where the current talent.id is appended to the ids array if it is not already present. The array should accumulate across multiple calls so that all shortlist models with hourly_rate <= 150 that the user actually opened are recorded.
required_variables.reason: Captures exactly which shortlist models under $150/hour were actually viewed in detail. The evaluator can then look at social_reach_total (or other social metrics) for these ids in talent_profiles, and confirm that the booked talent_id in booking_requests has higher social reach than at least one other id in this set, as required by the task.

requirements.task_name: Create a 'Summer Campaign' favorites list with 2 male and 2 female models aged 20–30 in Miami
requirements.task_description: Create a named favorites list and fill it with four Miami-based models in a specific age range and gender mix.

requirements.task_name: Message the first 3 bilingual commercial actors in Los Angeles with 4+ star ratings
requirements.task_description: Search for commercial actors in LA who speak English and Spanish with rating ≥ 4, then send an inquiry to the first three results.

required_variables.set_condition: After computing the filtered and sorted list of results, when searchTalent is called with all of the following effective filters: location equal to 'Los Angeles, CA' (case-insensitive on location_display), primary_category equal to 'Commercial Actor' (case-insensitive), languages_all defined and containing both 'English' and 'Spanish' (case-insensitive, order-independent), and min_rating defined and >= 4.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the applied filters, e.g. { location, primary_category, languages_all, min_rating, sort_by }.
required_variables.reason: Records that the user executed a talent search with the correct location, role, bilingual language requirement (both English and Spanish, not just either), and rating threshold, as specified in the task.

required_variables.set_condition: In the same qualifying call as for task6_searchParams (correct LA/commercial/bilingual/≥4 search), after applying filters and sorting (using sort_by, defaulting to relevance), just before returning the paged results.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object of the form { ids: [...] } where ids contains the IDs (talent.id) of the first three talents in the *unpaged* filtered + sorted list (i.e., before page/page_size slicing), or fewer if fewer than three results exist.
required_variables.reason: Captures which three profiles were actually at the top of the correctly filtered results. The evaluator can then check that the recipients in messages.recipient_talent_ids match these ids to confirm that the user messaged the first three qualifying bilingual commercial actors, not just any three.

requirements.task_name: Choose the cheapest monthly 'Basic' talent scouting subscription under $100 and proceed to review
requirements.task_description: Identify the cheapest qualifying Basic monthly plan under $100 and proceed in checkout to the review page.

requirements.task_name: Register 2 seats for the next 'Intro to Modeling' workshop in New York after August 1, 2026 with pay-on-site
requirements.task_description: Find the earliest qualifying workshop event in New York and register two seats with a pay-on-site or pay-later option.
